0.text: Infiltrative mass in the left pulmonary hilum encasing and narrowing the left main bronchus

1.text: Mass extends to the carina and right main bronchus, as well as mediastinal structures

2.text: Complete atelectasis of the left lung

3.text: Widespread ground glass opacities in the upper lobe of the right lung

4.text: Ground glass opacities medially in the superior segment of the right lower lobe
